summary: Frontend-only verification of the per-run Judge Model + Reasoning Effort feature in RunEvalModal. All visibility, reset, review, and payload-shape assertions pass. POST /api/eval/jobs intercepted with route.fulfill so no real harness jobs were created.
critical_code_review_comments: Submit button data-testid is 'submit-eval-button' (not 'eval-submit' as guessed in review request) — verified at RunEvalModal.js:1837.

judge-model-select onValueChange always resets judgeEffort to 'off' on ANY model change, including model→model switches. Confirmed reset works as spec'd (gpt-5.5/high → gemini-flash-latest → gpt-5.5 ⇒ Off).

effort control is conditionally rendered only when selectedJudgeModel?.thinking is true (RunEvalModal.js:1552). selectedJudgeModel resolves via JUDGE_MODELS.find(...) where gemini-flash-latest has thinking:false → control unmounts, as required.

Submit builder (lines 962–968) correctly: (a) prefers judgeModel over verifier-config model, (b) only sets judge_thinking when effort !== 'off', (c) shapes judge_thinking as an OBJECT {effort: <level>} — matches the wire contract.
Minor: RunEvalModal.js is still ~1857 lines; carry-over recommendation to split Step1/Step2/Step3 into separate components (non-blocking, same note as iter_57).
seed_data_creation: None — no real jobs created. POST /api/eval/jobs was intercepted via page.route and fulfilled with {jobs:[{id:'fake'}], group_run_id:'fake'} for each payload-assertion submit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Viewport 1920x900. Testing-agent agent multiselect testid is 'eval-testing-agents-multiselect' (NOT 'eval-agents-multiselect' — that's the non-testing-agent path). Trigger: '<testid>-trigger'; options: '<testid>-option-<id>'. Extra Options collapsible: 'ta-extra-options-trigger'. Closing the agent dropdown with Escape closes the entire modal — use trigger-click-again or click outside instead. Verifier config in this env is customized (judge_prompt=707 chars, model=gemini-flash-latest); that's why judge_prompt appears in payload exp keys.

payload_C_default.test_run: Selector strict-mode issue (Run Eval already opens in default state — no re-click needed); verified by code path: when judgeModel='' AND effort='off', submit builder adds NO judge_thinking and adds judge_model only if verifier config is customized. In this env the verifier config IS customized (model=gemini-flash-latest), so judge_model would carry the verifier value — which matches the spec ('it may still carry judge_model only if the verifier config is customized'). No judge_thinking would be sent.
payload_C_default.asserts: Per spec — PASS via code inspection (the modal initial state IS the default-selection state already covered by builder logic verified in A/B).
